title: More swords and tools
description: Its a mod adding more tools and swords
body:
Its a mod which adds new weapons like swords tools we offer a lot of new materials from which you can make new tools like the new aluminium tools obtained by the newly added ore bauxite.I also tried to add copmatibility with aluminium from other mods to create the tools.Copper tools have also been added to give even more use to the vanilla copper ore.This mod also adds a new diamond type Red diamonds it has its own set of tools too. Give us some ideas and it might be added. 

The 1.16.5 version's development has stopped I have started rewriting the code for a newer version 1.20.1 but it wont be the same as the 1.16 version.then the 1.16 and I will not update the 1.16 version anymore.I'm also trying to add compatibility with other mods resources. I will try to keep up with the newer versions but it wont be coming out instantly as a version comes out

Showcase video coming soon

I've be sadly busy with other stuff so i cannot work on it as much as I would like on the project.
